overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a dystopian urban environment. The player traverses neon-lit plazas, commercial streets with holographic advertisements, and narrow foggy alleys bathed in pink and purple light. The scene features dense cyberpunk architecture with mixed industrial and modern elements, atmospheric haze, and sparse pedestrian NPCs.

events.description: begins ascending concrete stairs toward upper plaza level

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a semi-enclosed urban plaza at night, dominated by a concrete staircase leading upward. A pink neon heart sign glows on the left wall near a vending machine. The camera ascends the stairs, passing metal railings and an orange trash barrel, approaching a person in red pants at the top of the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with neon-lit shops and holographic billboards

events.description: dialogue interaction UI appears at bottom of screen indicating available conversation option

agents.ego_description: walking along a commercial street lined with shops and advertisements, passing various neon signs

entered.detail: large purple neon sign reading 'EL GUAPO' on building facade
storefront with bright pink and blue neon signage and illuminated displays
tall modern building with green-tinted glass windows and illuminated interior
low concrete wall with metal railings separating walkway from lower level

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to an open commercial street with the 'EL GUAPO' neon sign visible on the right. The camera walks past a sex shop with bright pink neon lights and a modern glass office tower on the left. A concrete barrier with railings runs along the right side. At the end of the segment, a game UI element appears indicating an available interaction.

scene_state.functional_zone: club entrance with curved facade and mannequin display windows

events.description: turns left to follow the curved building facade of the Bliss club

agents.ego_description: approaching the Bliss club entrance and turning to follow its curved wall with illuminated display windows

entered.detail: large cursive neon sign reading 'Bliss' in warm yellow light
curved display windows with illuminated mannequins in various poses behind hexagonal glass
traditional red paper lantern hanging near the club entrance

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the 'Bliss' club with its distinctive curved facade and large cursive neon sign. The segment features illuminated display windows containing mannequins posed against bright backlights. The camera turns left to follow the building's curve, passing a red paper lantern and trash debris on the ground, moving toward a narrow alley entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow foggy alley with dense vertical neon signage and atmospheric haze

events.description: enters narrow alley with heavy pink atmospheric fog and dense neon lighting
passes Softsys storefront with bright teal neon signage on the left

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow foggy alley surrounded by intense pink and purple neon lights, passing pedestrians near doorways

notable_agents.action: person in red standing near a doorway with pink neon trim

entered.detail: tight corridor formed by tall industrial buildings on both sides with fire escapes and air conditioning units
bright teal neon sign reading 'Softsys' above a storefront
tall vertical illuminated banners and signs hanging between buildings
thick pink and purple atmospheric haze filling the alley and diffusing the neon lights

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions into a narrow alley bathed in intense pink and purple neon light with heavy atmospheric fog. The camera walks between tall industrial building walls covered in vertical signage and hanging wires. A 'Softsys' teal neon sign is visible on the left, while various pedestrians stand near doorways. The alley floor is littered with debris, and the dense haze creates a moody, cyberpunk atmosphere as the camera moves deeper into the corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a concrete urban plaza into the depths of a neon-drenched, foggy alleyway. It begins by ascending a concrete staircase past a glowing pink heart sign and a vending machine, moving toward a figure waiting at the top. As the camera reaches the street level, the environment opens into a commercial district characterized by the bright lights of a sex shop and the towering glass facade of a modern office building. The scene then shifts toward the curved architecture of the Bliss club, passing illuminated mannequin displays and red lanterns before turning left toward a narrow opening. Finally, the camera enters a claustrophobic corridor bathed in intense purple and pink light, where heavy atmospheric fog swirls around industrial walls, hanging wires, and teal neon signage.
